SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls

Class TlsMetadata

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls.TlsMetadata
public class TlsMetadata extends Object
Aggregated metadata from a TLS handshake. Contains all information extracted during the handshake for analysis.

      public int getNegotiatedVersion()
      Get negotiated TLS version.

    • getVersionString

      public String getVersionString()
      Get negotiated TLS version as a string.

    • getCipherSuite

      public int getCipherSuite()
      Get negotiated cipher suite.

    • isTLS13

      public boolean isTLS13()
      Check if TLS 1.3 was negotiated.

    • getServerExtensions

      public List<TlsExtension> getServerExtensions()
      Get server extensions from ServerHello.

    • getCertificateChain

      public List<X509Certificate> getCertificateChain()
      Get the certificate chain.

    • getEndEntityCertificate

      public X509Certificate getEndEntityCertificate()
      Get the end-entity (leaf) certificate.

    • getAllSCTs

      public List<byte[]> getAllSCTs()
      Get all SCTs from all three possible sources: 1. TLS extension in ServerHello (type 0x0012) 2. X.509 extension in certificates 3. OCSP stapled response

    • getTlsExtensionSCT

      public byte[] getTlsExtensionSCT()
      Get SCTs from TLS ServerHello extension.

    • getCertificateSCTs

      public List<byte[]> getCertificateSCTs()
      Get SCTs embedded in X.509 certificates.

    • getOcspSCTs

      public List<byte[]> getOcspSCTs()
      Get SCTs from OCSP stapled response.

    • hasSCTs

      public boolean hasSCTs()
      Check if any SCTs were found.

    • getFingerprintCode

      public String getFingerprintCode()
      Get the fingerprint code for this handshake. Returns a 3-character code representing cipher, version, and extension count.
      Returns:
      3-character fingerprint code, or "|||" if no response

    • getFingerprintExtensions

      public byte[] getFingerprintExtensions()
      Get the raw extensions bytes for fingerprint hashing.
      Returns:
      Raw extension bytes from ServerHello

    • hasStapledOcspResponse

      public boolean hasStapledOcspResponse()
      Check if OCSP stapling response was received.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
